candidates.why: Primary top-line revenue label; preferred over duplicate total row.
Duplicate total revenue label with identical values; useful as lower-priority fallback.

variables.notes: Both labels represent the same top-line revenue across years; ordered with the more direct label first.

candidates.why: Direct cost-of-sales style line and appears to equal total cost of revenues.
Granular direct cost component within cost of revenues.

candidates.row_label: Labor & Related Expenses in Cost of Revenue
candidates.why: Granular direct labor component within cost of revenue.

final_choice.row_label: Labor & Related Expenses in Cost of Revenue

variables.notes: Chose granular direct cost components instead of subtotal/total rows, per instruction to prefer components over subtotal labels. Did not use 'Cost of services' or 'Cost of Revenues - Total' to avoid double counting.

candidates.why: Operating overhead bucket; populated and clearly SG&A.
Granular administrative overhead component, excluding depreciation.

candidates.row_label: Labor & Related Expenses in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: SG&A labor overhead component; exact label appears on the sheet.

final_choice.row_label: Labor & Related Expenses in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses

variables.notes: No single explicit SG&A row exists. Selected overhead buckets/components while excluding depreciation/amortization. Used 'Sales and marketing costs' as the clean SG&A bucket for selling expense. For administrative expense, avoided total 'Administrative costs' because it appears to include depreciation; instead selected its non-depreciation components. The SG&A labor label appears twice on the sheet, but per rule the same row_label cannot be repeated in final_choice, so it is included once.

candidates.why: R&D-related label exists, but it is a balance-sheet asset gross amount rather than income-statement expense.

variables.notes: No dedicated R&D expense line appears on the Income Statement. 'Research & Development Costs - Gross' is a balance-sheet asset line, not an expense, so XRD is left empty.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest
Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Recurring lease-interest financing cost; should be included with interest expense.
Broader total finance-cost line, but it includes FX and other items, so less preferred than components.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest
Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities

variables.notes: Selected granular recurring interest cost components and avoided broader 'Financial expenses' because it includes non-interest items such as foreign exchange losses and would risk double counting.

candidates.why: Appears to exclude non-controlling interest because 'Total Equity' exceeds it by the NCI amount in years where NCI is present.
Includes non-controlling interest, so less suitable for BE when a parent-equity line exists.

variables.notes: Preferred 'Equity' because it excludes non-controlling interest, avoiding double counting when MIB is added separately.

candidates.why: Balance-sheet NCI line; appropriate for minority interest input.
Income-statement allocation of profit, not the balance-sheet minority equity amount.

variables.notes: Used the balance-sheet minority equity line, not the income-statement profit allocation lines.
